meaning: adj.[医]邻间的,邻接近端间的
examples: In Group b, interproximal enamel reduction was made, but no polishing and remineralize treatment.
Results The interproximal gingival papillae adjacent to all transplanted teeth were normal or slightly hyperplastic.
Most food impaction happened in the interproximal of molars. The impaction types were mainly hybrid and vertical impaction, and only 9.7% was horizontal impaction.
